title: Family Service Centre (FSC)
text:
Family Service Centre (FSC) - SupportGoWhere
Family Service Centre (FSC)
Share link
FSCs provide support for vulnerable individuals and families with social and emotional issues, and work towards stability, self-reliance and social mobility.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Nominal charges may apply
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

FSCs are community-based social services that provide support for vulnerable individuals and families with social and emotional issues. Social Work Practitioners at the FSCs provide case management support and also partner with other agencies to coordinate holistic support for clients to help them achieve stability, self-reliance, and social mobility.

FSC services include:

Information and Referral: Providing information about social services, and linking individuals and families to appropriate social services and community resources based on the assessed needs

Casework: Providing holistic case management and individual/family counselling

Group Work: Bringing individuals and families with common needs together for purposeful group interactions to address their concerns and bring about positive change

Community Work: Tapping on community resources to help individuals and families support and empower one another.

Who is this for?

FSCs are open to families and individuals:

Regardless of age, race, language or religion;

At different life stages (such as couples, families with young children, adolescents, or elderly members); and

Of various family structures

What to expect?

Upon contact with a FSC, a FSC worker will assess the needs of the individual/family and determine the type of support needed.

If FSC services are required, the FSC will then work with the individual/family on their issues with the appropriate social work interventions.

If the FSC’s services are not required and other supportive services by other partners can help to meet these needs, the FSC worker will refer the individual/family to appropriate social services or community resources.

How to apply?

Call, walk in or email the FSCs for help on family, socio-emotional, interpersonal or other social issues. 
To find the FSC in your neighbourhood, you can call ComCare hotline at 1800 222 0000 or visit 
https://www.msf.gov.sg/our-services/directories.

Information last updated on 17 Sep 2025
